title: Expenses of superintendent and employees
doc_html:
§26.  Expenses of superintendent and employees

The travel and other necessary expenses of the superintendent and the employees of the department, while engaged in their official duties, shall be paid by the superintendent from funds appropriated by the legislature for the purpose.  

Acts 1975, No. 274, §1.
